data.html:
/* tokens.css — single source of truth for color / type / space.
   Dark is the default (no attribute). Light is opt-in via html[data-theme="light"].
   Palette mirrors the OmniRoute dashboard (src/app/globals.css). */
:root {
  /* brand */
  --primary: #e54d5e;
  --primary-hover: #c93d4e;
  --accent: #6366f1;
  --accent-2: #8b5cf6;
  --accent-3: #a855f7;
  --success: #22c55e;
  --warning: #f59e0b;
  --error: #ef4444;
  --tl-red: #ff5f56;
  --tl-yellow: #ffbd2e;
  --tl-green: #27c93f;

  /* dark surfaces (default) */
  --bg: #0b0e14;
  --bg-alt: #111520;
  --surface: #161b22;
  --surface-2: #1c2230;
  --border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  --border-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  /* graph-paper background grid (fixed wallpaper) — opacity matched to the
     OmniRoute dashboard (0.06 dark / 0.07 light) for one shared visual identity */
  --grid-line: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  --grid-size: 32px;
  /* subtle overlay for alternating sections so the grid shows through */
  --section-alt: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.018);
  --text: #e6e6ef;
  --text-muted: #8b8b9e;
  --text-dim: #5a5a6e;

  /* gradients */
  --grad-brand: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--accent-3));
  --grad-soft: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(229, 77, 94, 0.12), rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.12));

  /* typography */
  --font-sans: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Inter, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: ui-monospace, "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "SF Mono", monospace;
  --step--1: clamp(0.8rem, 0.78rem + 0.1vw, 0.85rem);
  --step-0: clamp(0.95rem, 0.9rem + 0.25vw, 1.05rem);
  --step-1: clamp(1.1rem, 1rem + 0.5vw, 1.3rem);
  --step-2: clamp(1.4rem, 1.2rem + 1vw, 2rem);
  --step-3: clamp(1.8rem, 1.4rem + 2vw, 2.8rem);
  --step-4: clamp(2.4rem, 1.8rem + 3vw, 4rem); /* headlines */
  --step-6: clamp(3.5rem, 2.5rem + 6vw, 7rem); /* giant numbers (226 / 1.9B) */

  /* layout */
  --container: 1180px;
  --gap: 1.5rem;
  --radius: 14px;
  --radius-sm: 9px;
  --nav-h: 64px;

  /* motion */
  --reveal-dur: 600ms;
  --ease: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
}

/* light theme — same brand colors, inverted surfaces */
html[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg: #f9f9fb;
  --bg-alt: #f0f0f5;
  --surface: #ffffff;
  --surface-2: #f5f5fa;
  --border: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  --border-strong: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14);
  --grid-line: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
  --section-alt: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.022);
  --text: #1a1a2e;
  --text-muted: #71717a;
  --text-dim: #9a9aa5;
  --grad-soft: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(229, 77, 94, 0.08), rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.08));
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  :root {
    --reveal-dur: 0ms;
  }
}
